summary: Tested P2 features: Auto-Map (Otomatik Esle) for Exely and HotelRunner, Wire Failure Tracking Dashboard, and Enhanced Mapping Tables. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
features_tested: POST /api/channel-manager/auto-map/suggest with provider='exely' - Returns suggestions, unmapped types
POST /api/channel-manager/auto-map/suggest with provider='hotelrunner' - Returns suggestions, unmapped types
GET /api/channel-manager/wire-failures/summary?days=30 - Returns total failures (5647), breakdown, health status (critical)
GET /api/channel-manager/wire-failures/recent?limit=10 - Returns recent failures with provider filter
GET /api/channel-manager/wire-failures/trend?days=30 - Returns daily failure trend data
Exely Integration page (/exely) - Eslemeler tab with mapping status bar (50%), Otomatik Esle button, mappings table with delete
HotelRunner Integration page (/hotelrunner) - Eslemeler tab with mapping status bar (66.7%), Otomatik Esle button, mappings table
Wire Failure Dashboard page (/wire-failures) - Health status cards, failure breakdown, trend chart, recent failures list with filters
Navigation sidebar - Kanallar dropdown contains Wire Failure Takibi link

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw text (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from previous iterations

frontend.wire_failure_health_cards: PASSED - GENEL DURUM: Kritik, TOPLAM HATA: 5647, ARI HARD FAIL: 215, ACIK RECON SORUNU: 1179
frontend.wire_failure_breakdown_stats: PASSED - ARI HARD FAILS: 215, EXELY SYNC FAILS: 5432, DLQ ITEMS: 0, CONTROL PLANE FAILS: 0, RECONCILIATION ISSUES: 1179, OBSERVABILITY ERRORS: 756
frontend.wire_failure_trend_chart: PASSED - Shows daily failure trend for last 14 days
frontend.wire_failure_recent_tab: PASSED - Filter buttons (Tumu, ARI, EXELY, DLQ, CONTROL PLANE) and failures list
frontend.exely_integration_page_loads: PASSED - Title: Exely Entegrasyonu, Connection: Bagli
frontend.exely_mapping_status_bar: PASSED - Esleme Durumu: 3/6 PMS oda tipi (50%)
frontend.exely_mappings_table: PASSED - Shows PMS Oda Tipi, Exely Oda Kodu, Rate Plan, Sync badges, delete buttons
frontend.exely_unmapped_warning: PASSED - Shows Family (3 oda), Junior Suite (3 oda), Superior (7 oda)
frontend.exely_auto_map_dialog: PASSED - Opens with suggestions or 'no new types' message
frontend.hotelrunner_integration_page_loads: PASSED - Title: HotelRunner Entegrasyonu, Connection: Bagli
frontend.hotelrunner_mapping_status_bar: PASSED - Esleme Durumu: 4/6 PMS oda tipi (66.7%)
frontend.hotelrunner_mappings_table: PASSED - Shows HR Oda Adi, Inv/Rate Code, PMS Oda Tipi dropdown, toggles, Eslendi badges
frontend.hotelrunner_auto_map_dialog: PASSED - Opens with unmapped PMS types: Family (3 oda), Suite (5 oda)
frontend.navigation_kanallar_dropdown: PASSED - Contains Wire Failure Takibi link

critical_code_review_comments: Auto-Map feature uses name similarity algorithm with 0.4 threshold for matching PMS room types to provider room types
Wire Failure Dashboard aggregates data from multiple collections: ari_hard_fail_log, exely_sync_logs, connector_outbox, cp_failures, cm_reconciliation_issues, observability_errors
Exely mapping status shows 3/6 (50%) mapped, HotelRunner shows 4/6 (66.7%) mapped
Wire Failure health status is 'critical' with 5647 total failures in last 30 days
All UI labels are correctly in Turkish as expected
Navigation properly includes Wire Failure Takibi under Kanallar dropdown menu
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_p2_auto_map_wire_failures.py - Created comprehensive test file for P2 features
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features (Auto-Map, Wire Failure Tracking, Enhanced Mappings) are fully functional. Auto-Map uses similarity matching to suggest room type mappings. Wire Failure Dashboard shows aggregated failure data from multiple sources. Exely has 3/6 mappings (50%), HotelRunner has 4/6 mappings (66.7%). Wire Failure status is 'critical' with 5647 total failures. Navigation includes Wire Failure Takibi under Kanallar dropdown.
